title: carlina guittonneaui
intro: Carlina guittonneaui, also known as Carlina, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Carlina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Carlina can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
